summary: Highly praised audience recording that is considered the best audio source available, with no specific show details provided
review: The sole reviewer rates this release four stars and highlights it as the best audience (Aud) source in the archive, indicating excellent sound quality. No comments are made about the musical performance, setlist flow, or individual band members, so the show's artistic merit remains unassessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive rating and strong praise for audio quality boost the score, but lack of any musical commentary limits confidence and keeps the overall rating modest.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it the best Aud source, implying clear, well‑balanced sound with minimal noise.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No information on performance quality or set pacing was provided in the review.
